memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Thomas Knollys or Knolles (died 1435)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Thomas Knollys or Knolles (died 1435) was an English businessman in London who was active in both local and national government.

zh.North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London於1350年出生在英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯時，他的父親Sir Richard Knollys20歲，母親Catherine Beverley34歲。他於1371年之前與Joan在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年7月11日之前在英國米德萊可倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧古斯丁 煙雨 聖 菲絲 沃特林 史崔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London于1350年出生在英国賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯时，他的父亲Sir Richard Knollys20岁，母亲Catherine Beverley34岁。他于1371年之前与Joan在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年7月11日之前在英国米德萊可倫敦，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 奧古斯丁 煙雨 聖 菲絲 沃特林 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Knollys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London was born in 1350, in North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Knollys, was 20 and his mother, Catherine Beverley, was 34. He married Joan before 1371, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 11 July 1435, in London, Middlesex, England, and was buried in St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London est né en 1350, à North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Knollys, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Beverley, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan avant 1371, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 11 juillet 1435, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London 1350 in North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Knollys 20 und seine Mutter Catherine Beverley 34. Er hat vor 1371 in London, Middlesex, England Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 11. Juli 1435 in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London è nato il nel 1350 nel North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Knollys, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Beverley, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan prima del 1371, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 11 luglio 1435, nel London, Middlesex, England, e fu sepolto a St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of Londonが1350年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアノース ムインムズで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Knollysは20歳，母Catherine Beverleyは34歳であった。1371年以前にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年7月11日以前にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト アウグスティン ウィス スト ファイス ワトリング ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Augustine With Saint Faith Watling: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 오구스틴 위스 스트 파이스 왓링 스트릿
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London(이)가 1350년 영국 허트퍼드실르 노르스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Knollys(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Beverley(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1371년 이전 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 7월 11일 이전 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 오구스틴 위스 스트 파이스 왓링 스트릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London nasceu em 1350, em North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Knollys, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Beverley, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan antes 1371, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 11 de julho de 1435, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Augustine With Saint Faith Watling: ст аугустаин вит ст феит ватлинг стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London родился в 1350 г. в местности норт миммс, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Knollys было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Beverley, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan перед 1371 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 11 июля 1435 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст аугустаин вит ст феит ватлинг стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
